name: Fish and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 lb fish fillets; (cod, halibut -sole) cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat skillet (non-stick) and saute onion in oil.
2. Add mushrooms and saute about 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until mushrooms wilt.
3. Spread half of fillet slices on mushrooms; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Spread remaining fillet slices on mushrooms; sprinkle these with salt and pepper.
5. Add celery, soy sauce, and sherry; cook gently, covered, for ten minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 3 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 200
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (1985 version)
